特記事項: 【合併】英語Iｄ　１７（経済学部）/英語IIｂ　１７（経済学部）
授業方法: Class will be face to face style. In this class, students will practice using the target language through a variety of lessons and activities.  Pair and group work will be an integral part of each class.  Situational pair work dialog construction and presentation will also be a fundamental part of the course.

第1回: 【Startup Week】         【Flex Hours】      "Online class（On-demand format）"   《30 minutes》　　Welcome back, review of rules and regulations, group work:  expectations for this semester
Essay homework:  Summer in Japan, one hour of out of class study
第2回: 【Core Weeks 1】          "Face-to-face class"          《90 minutes》            Summer Holiday group interview chart, short speeches
Review of today's in-class study. 45 minutes of preparation.
第3回: 【Core Weeks 2】            "Face-to-face class"         《90 minutes》                                                 Text Unit 7 "Food" asking what something means, listening comprehension drills, practice dialogs extended
Food choices: worksheet homework assignment. One hour of out of class study.
第4回: 【Core Weeks 3】            "Face-to-face class"       《90 minutes》                                                          Text Unit 8 "Transportation" asking for and giving directions, listening comprehension drills
Identifying common grammar mistakes. One hour of study.
第5回: 【Core Weeks 4】             "Face-to-face class"         《90 minutes》                                                         Text Unit 8 "Transportation" continued, explaining commutes, What is the question? dialog construction
Extending the in-class dialog construction. One hour or more of out of class study.
第6回: 【Core Weeks 5】            "Face-to-face class"         　《90 minutes》                                                                                　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　Text Unit 9 "Shopping and Money" devising your own budget, financial vocabulary terms, dialog practice and extension
Matching: country and currency, financial terms. One hour of study.
第7回:
【Flex Hours】    
       "Online class（On-demand format）         《90 minutes》　　　　　Research project: Economic powerhouse countries, similarities and differences
Comparing other classmates research to your own, small group discussion
第8回: 【Core Weeks 6】        "Face-to-face class"               《90 minutes》                                                    Text Unit 9 "Shopping and Money" continued, listening comprehension drills, shops and businesses
Making questions from the in-class listening comprehension drills. One hour or more of study.
第9回: 【Core Weeks 7】            "Face-to-face class"                《90 minutes》                                            Text Unit 10 "Health" habits and routines, kinds of stress, pair work questionnaire
Begin outline for presentation. One hour or more of study.
第10回: 【Core Weeks 8】           "Face-to-face class"               《90 minutes》　　　　　　　　Slang and gestures, individual presentations first draft writing
Revision of presentation writing. One hour or more of study.
第11回:
【Core Weeks 9】          "Face-to-face class"              《90 minutes》
                                Individual presentations and feedback, corrective criticism, cultural misunderstandings and language use
Presentation result worksheet. One hour of out of class study.
第13回: 【Core Weeks 10】          "Face-to-face class"            《90 minutes》 　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　Text Unit 11 "People and Countries" describing people and cultural differences dialog, world map, cultural and geographical questions
Report: individual countries to be announced. One hour or more of study.
第14回:
【Flex Hours】    
       "Online class（On-demand format）         《90 minutes》　　　　　Research project: Economic powerhouse countries, similarities and differences
Country and customs worksheet assignment. One hour of study.
第15回: 【Core Weeks 11】    "Face-to-face class"          　《90 minutes》 　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　　Text Unit 11 "People and Countries" continued, What is famous in ...? pair work dialog construction and presentation, Exam explanation and practice
Research: Potential problems when traveling. One hour of out of class study.
第16回: 【Core Weeks 12】         "Face-to-face class"         《90 minutes》              【Classes and examinations period】
トピック.授業外学習2: Students would be advised to do as much personal study outside the classroom as possible.  Also, to submit any homework assignments on time.

教科書/Required texts0: "Who Said What?"  Joe M Jacobs   Marathon Publishing
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
